indexes.title: Index to Part 1 of John Buck Oral History Interview

lines.line: > Interviewer Stephanie Milne-Lane and narrator John Buck conduct introductions. John Bucks provides background on his professional career as a funeral director and Gem County Coroner.
**Gem County, Coroner, funeral director, mortuary school**

metadata.title: Introductions
metadata.synopsis: Interviewer Stephanie Milne-Lane and narrator John Buck conduct introductions. John Bucks provides background on his professional career as a funeral director and Gem County Coroner.
metadata.keywords: Gem County, Coroner, funeral director, mortuary school

lines.line: > John Buck shares his experiences during the Covid-19 pandemic. He shares his experiences as a private citizen, funeral director, and the Gem County Coroner. He also explains the policies and procedures that were put into place to ensure the Gem County Coroner's Office functioned even if staff fell ill.
**cruise ship, masking, PPE, funerals, livestream, refrigerated trailer, vaccines,**
keywords: **cruise ship, masking, PPE, funerals, livestream, refrigerated trailer, vaccines,**

metadata.title: Covid Experiences
metadata.synopsis: John Buck shares his experiences during the Covid-19 pandemic. He shares his experiences as a private citizen, funeral director, and the Gem County Coroner. He also explains the policies and procedures that were put into place to ensure the Gem County Coroner's Office functioned even if staff fell ill.
metadata.keywords: cruise ship, masking, PPE, funerals, livestream, refrigerated trailer, vaccines,

lines.line: > John Buck describes his perception of vaccines in the state of Idaho. He also shares his views on how politics became involved with the vaccine effort. He also describes the lasting effects of Covid one of his acquaintances experienced.
vaccines, President Trump, politics, hoax, Covid, personal choice

metadata.title: Vaccine
metadata.synopsis: John Buck describes his perception of vaccines in the state of Idaho. He also shares his views on how politics became involved with the vaccine effort. He also describes the lasting effects of Covid one of his acquaintances experienced.
metadata.notes: vaccines, President Trump, politics, hoax, Covid, personal choice

metadata.title: Professional Development
metadata.synopsis: John Buck describes the effort he was involved in to create a law that would add a dollar to each death certificate, which would in turn fund professional development for County Coroner's in Idaho.
metadata.keywords: education, death certificate, Idaho State Association of County Coroners, state house

children.text: > Interviewer Stephanie Milne-Lane and narrator John Buck conduct introductions. John Bucks provides background on his professional career as a funeral director and Gem County Coroner.
**Gem County, Coroner, funeral director, mortuary school**

> John Buck shares his experiences during the Covid-19 pandemic. He shares his experiences as a private citizen, funeral director, and the Gem County Coroner. He also explains the policies and procedures that were put into place to ensure the Gem County Coroner's Office functioned even if staff fell ill.
**cruise ship, masking, PPE, funerals, livestream, refrigerated trailer, vaccines,**

> John Buck describes his perception of vaccines in the state of Idaho. He also shares his views on how politics became involved with the vaccine effort. He also describes the lasting effects of Covid one of his acquaintances experienced.
vaccines, President Trump, politics, hoax, Covid, personal choice
> John Buck describes the effort he was involved in to create a law that would add a dollar to each death certificate, which would in turn fund professional development for County Coroner's in Idaho.
**education, death certificate, Idaho State Association of County Coroners, state house**
